summary: Delayed verifier proof for Frantic bounty #11. Demonstrates the full verifier scheduler lifecycle: 5 immediate machine checks passed at 2026-06-24T07:03:45.541Z, 1 delayed url.live check (public_url_live, status=ready) with blocks_acceptance=true, delivery resubmitted to trigger the delayed recheck, and a real sealed runx receipt (sha256:e42c32915b98e88c43942aa0a2844f1a462be898d555ffce533d891fca98f7a0) as the final receipt anchor.
observations: Execution environment: WSL Ubuntu 26.04 on Windows
check: evidence_json_valid, uses: json.valid, status: passed at 2026-06-24T07:03:45.541Z
check: public_url_admitted, uses: url.public_surface, status: passed at 2026-06-24T07:03:45.541Z - host: codeboost-tr.github.io
check: artifact_summary, uses: json.path_min_string_length, status: passed at 2026-06-24T07:03:45.541Z - 289 chars
check: evidence_items, uses: json.path_min_items, status: passed at 2026-06-24T07:03:45.541Z - 32 items
check: report_depth, uses: markdown.min_bullets, status: passed at 2026-06-24T07:03:45.541Z - 8 bullets
The Frantic verifier recipe for bounty #11 defines a url.live check_schedules entry with deferred execution.
The check enters status=ready and is re-evaluated after the configured not_before window.
The verifier honors blocks_acceptance=true: acceptance is blocked until the delayed check resolves.
Delivery resubmitted at 2026-06-24T19:44:43.542Z to trigger the Frantic verifier re-evaluation.
The url.live check (public_url_live) remains in status=ready after the resubmission,
demonstrating the deferred scheduler behavior: the check is configured with a not_before
window and blocks_acceptance=true. The Frantic verifier will re-evaluate after the window elapses.
recipe includes check_schedules with 6 checks: url.live (deferred, blocks_acceptance=true), json.valid, url.public_surface, json.path_min_string_length, json.path_min_items, markdown.min_bullets
